# public/catalogue — auto-generated customer PDFs

This folder is auto-generated by `npm run export-pdfs` (or `npm run daily-sync`).
The PDFs here get served by the website so customers can download the
latest catalogue.

| File | Source |
| --- | --- |
| `metals-catalogue.pdf` | `outgoing-to-owner/Metals catalogue 2023.xlsx` exported via Excel COM |

> The PDFs are produced by **Excel itself** (via PowerShell COM automation),
> not by LibreOffice — the M-Machine letterhead logo uses an EMF/WMF vector
> format that LibreOffice doesn't render cleanly. Excel renders it perfectly.

> Do not edit these files by hand. Edit the Excel master files in
> `data-source/` and re-run the daily sync.

> These files are tracked in git so Vercel (or any static host) can serve
> them. Each daily sync produces a fresh git commit with the new PDFs.
